title: T-110 — UI: ApprovalHistoryTimeline (approval_history_timeline prototype) NPD-f slice of T-061
prompt:
# T-110 — ApprovalHistoryTimeline UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.7 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md approval_history
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:525-616 (ApprovalHistoryTimeline)
Parent root: T-061

## Goal
Server Component (read-only) ApprovalHistoryTimeline rendering reverse-chronological gate_approvals timeline: green/red circle per entry, vertical connector line, per-entry Card with approver + role + comment + date, and an expandable Collapsible 'View signature details' panel showing signer/role/timestamp/SHA-256 hash for e-signed entries.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/approval-history-timeline.tsx (RSC) accepts { entries: [{ id, gate, gateLabel, result, approver, role, notes, date, eSigned, eSignHash? }] }.
2. Reverse chronological order is producer-side; component renders entries as-given.
3. Empty state: shadcn Alert with AlertDescription 'No approvals recorded yet for this project'.
4. Each entry renders: circle (green ✓ for approved, red ✗ for rejected), gate label + status Badge (APPROVED/REJECTED), approver line, comment, date (mono).
5. eSigned entries: expandable Collapsible (Client subcomponent if needed) with signer/role/timestamp/cert-id/verification rows.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/approval-history-timeline.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/_components/__tests__/approval-history-timeline.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given ApprovalHistoryTimeline renders with sample entries, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/gate-screens.jsx:525-616, then it shows the same vertical timeline with green/red circles, gate label + APPROVED/REJECTED Badge, approver+role line, comment and date using shadcn Card+Badge+Alert primitives.
2. Given an entry with eSigned=true, when the 'View signature details' control is toggled, then a Collapsible panel reveals signer, role, timestamp, certificate id, and verification rows (Server Component data; Collapsible may be a Client subcomponent).
3. Given entries.length === 0, when the component renders, then an empty-state Alert with text 'No approvals recorded yet for this project' is shown and no timeline list is rendered.

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/approval-history-timeline.test.tsx asserting parity, eSigned expandable rows, empty-state Alert before component exists.
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test approval-history-timeline'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not fetch data inside the component (parent passes entries prop).
- Do not render e-signature details for non-eSigned entries.
